odeProperty.value: SdA con contenido para el B2 de Competencia digital

odeComponent.htmlView:
SdA destinada al alumnado de 1º de ESO.

Se basa en la exploración emocional, es decir, se realizará una secuenciación musical en la que se explorarán distintas emociones, así como distintas formas de gestionarlas.

El propósito básico es contribuir al crecimiento personal, así como ahondar y proporcionar herramientas para asimilar lo que la “intencionalidad” de la música puede afectar en las relaciones humanas. Para llevar a cabo esta propuesta, se organizará una secuenciación de actividades que comenzará con una “exploración” digital: El alumnado deberá navegar por diferentes estaciones sonoras y textuales donde se exploraban emociones (tristeza, euforia, alegría …).

Se propondrán retos de audición comparativa a fin de que expresen aspectos puramente musicales pueden influir en su estado anímico. Con esto se busca que los niños/as dejen de ser oyentes pasivos para analizar y describir sus propias sensaciones, para confirmar, finalmente, cómo la música puede tomar mucha parte a la hora de interactuar con el resto (incluso, a veces con nosotros mismos).
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1777401000271-kbg2yhkxz","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

SdA destinada al alumnado de 1º de ESO.

Se basa en la exploración emocional, es decir, se realizará una secuenciación musical en la que se explorarán distintas emociones, así como distintas formas de gestionarlas.

El propósito básico es contribuir al crecimiento personal, así como ahondar y proporcionar herramientas para asimilar lo que la “intencionalidad” de la música puede afectar en las relaciones humanas. Para llevar a cabo esta propuesta, se organizará una secuenciación de actividades que comenzará con una “exploración” digital: El alumnado deberá navegar por diferentes estaciones sonoras y textuales donde se exploraban emociones (tristeza, euforia, alegría …).

Se propondrán retos de audición comparativa a fin de que expresen aspectos puramente musicales pueden influir en su estado anímico. Con esto se busca que los niños/as dejen de ser oyentes pasivos para analizar y describir sus propias sensaciones, para confirmar, finalmente, cómo la música puede tomar mucha parte a la hora de interactuar con el resto (incluso, a veces con nosotros mismos).

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
La SdA se justifica en:

● La superación del desinterés, dado que, el tema elegido toca directamente en la realidad del alumnado, y que en la educación se respira cierto desinterés por muchas de las enseñanzas.

● Transformación de roles, porque el alumnado pasará de ser pasivo a tomar un papel totalmente activo y relevante ya que establecerá conclusiones sobre su propias sensaciones.

● Vínculo entre lo tecnológico y lo humano, porque el conocimiento técnico es una herramienta fundamental para que el análisis de conceptos que muchas veces nacen de lo teórico se hagan realidad de una forma ágil.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1777401086937-vmlf51ca1","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

La SdA se justifica en:

● La superación del desinterés, dado que, el tema elegido toca directamente en la realidad del alumnado, y que en la educación se respira cierto desinterés por muchas de las enseñanzas.

● Transformación de roles, porque el alumnado pasará de ser pasivo a tomar un papel totalmente activo y relevante ya que establecerá conclusiones sobre su propias sensaciones.

● Vínculo entre lo tecnológico y lo humano, porque el conocimiento técnico es una herramienta fundamental para que el análisis de conceptos que muchas veces nacen de lo teórico se hagan realidad de una forma ágil.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• Medición de la cantidad de sonido ambiente
  • Publicar en Genially
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1777401410586-ky8qs0msc","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"
  • Medición de la cantidad de sonido ambiente
  • Publicar en Genially
","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Haz un grupo de 4 personas.

  1. Mediante uno de los sonómetros que te puedes descargar a tu móvil (los enlaces están abajo), mide diferentes espacios sonoros (en el aula de música y en el patio) y guarda los resultados.
  2. Crea una plantilla de Genially y publica tus resultados

Descarga sonómetro para ANDROID

Descarga sonómetro para IPHONE
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1777401454807-pui0jdci9","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Haz un grupo de 4 personas.

  1. Mediante uno de los sonómetros que te puedes descargar a tu móvil (los enlaces están abajo), mide diferentes espacios sonoros (en el aula de música y en el patio) y guarda los resultados.
  2. Crea una plantilla de Genially y publica tus resultados

Descarga sonómetro para ANDROID

Descarga sonómetro para IPHONE

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: Una vez que ya tienes los materiales, ahora hay que organizarlos. En el reto verás como hacerlo ...
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1777402045303-2miwb8nx3","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Una vez que ya tienes los materiales, ahora hay que organizarlos. En el reto verás como hacerlo ...

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
1. Cataloga los sonidos recogidos en "Sonidos molestos", "sonidos agradables", "sonidos graciosos" o cualquier otro tipo de adjetivo que los identifique.
    Crea un padlet con las tarjetas de esos atributos
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1777402033404-hgn9b1d18","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"
    \n
  1. Cataloga los sonidos recogidos en \"Sonidos molestos\", \"sonidos agradables\", \"sonidos graciosos\" o cualquier otro tipo de adjetivo que los identifique.
    Crea un padlet con las tarjetas de esos atributos
    2. \n
","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Debate, junto a tu grupo, los resultados obtenidos con el resto de la clase. Toma nota de las conclusiones finales.

%7B%22typeGame%22%3A%22Rubric%22%2C%22version%22%3A2%2C%22id%22%3A%22idevice-1777535600097-jd1niefiy%22%2C%22table%22%3A%7B%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20para%20evaluar%20un%20debate%20en%20el%20aula%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%22Organizaci%F3n%22%2C%22Debate%22%2C%22Uso%20de%20hechos%22%2C%22Informaci%F3n%22%2C%22Presentaci%F3n%20y%20lenguaje%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%224%20Excelente%22%2C%223%20Satisfactorio%22%2C%222%20Mejorable%22%2C%221%20Insuficiente%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Todos%20los%20argumentos%20est%E1n%20organizados%20de%20forma%20l%F3gica%20en%20torno%20a%20una%20idea%20principal.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20los%20argumentos%20est%E1n%20organizados%20de%20forma%20l%F3gica%20en%20torno%20a%20una%20idea%20principal.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Una%20parte%20de%20los%20argumentos%20no%20est%E1n%20organizados%20en%20torno%20a%20una%20idea%20principal%20de%20forma%20clara%20y%20l%F3gica.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Los%20argumentos%20no%20est%E1n%20vinculados%20a%20una%20idea%20principal.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Todos%20los%20contra-argumentos%20son%20precisos%2C%20relevantes%20y%20fuertes.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20los%20contra-argumentos%20son%20precisos%2C%20relevantes%20y%20fuertes.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Algunos%20contra-argumentos%20son%20precisos%2C%20relevantes%20y%20fuertes%2C%20pero%20otros%20son%20muy%20d%E9biles.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Los%20contra-argumentos%20no%20son%20precisos%20y/o%20relevantes.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Cada%20punto%20principal%20esta%20bien%20apoyado%20con%20varios%20hechos%20relevantes%2C%20estad%EDsticas%20y/o%20ejemplos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Casi%20todos%20los%20puntos%20principales%20est%E1n%20adecuadamente%20apoyados%20con%20varios%20hechos%20relevantes%2C%20estad%EDsticas%20y/o%20ejemplos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Cada%20punto%20principal%20esta%20adecuadamente%20apoyado%20con%20varios%20hechos%2C%20estad%EDsticas%20y/o%20ejemplos%3B%20pero%20algunos%20de%20los%20hechos%20no%20son%20relevantes.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Los%20puntos%20principales%20no%20est%E1n%20apoyados%20por%20hechos.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Toda%20la%20informaci%F3n%20presentada%20en%20el%20debate%20es%20clara%20y%20precisa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%20parte%20de%20la%20informaci%F3n%20presentada%20en%20el%20debate%20es%20clara%20y%20precisa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%20parte%20de%20la%20informaci%F3n%20presentada%20en%20el%20debate%20no%20es%20clara%20ni%20precisa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20informaci%F3n%20tiene%20varios%20errores%20y%20no%20siempre%20es%20clara.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20equipo%20usa%20continuamente%20gestos%2C%20contacto%20visual%2C%20tono%20de%20voz%2C%20nivel%20de%20entusiasmo%20y%20el%20lenguaje%20en%20una%20forma%20que%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20equipo%20por%20lo%20general%20usa%20gestos%2C%20contacto%20visual%2C%20tono%20de%20voz%2C%20nivel%20de%20entusiasmo%20y%20lenguaje%20en%20una%20forma%20que%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20equipo%20algunas%20veces%20usa%20gestos%2C%20contacto%20visual%2C%20tono%20de%20voz%20%2C%20nivel%20de%20entusiasmo%20y%20lenguaje%20en%20una%20forma%20que%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Uno%20o%20m%E1s%20de%20los%20miembros%20del%20equipo%20tienen%20un%20estilo%20de%20presentaci%F3n%20y%20lenguaje%20que%20no%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%5D%5D%7D%2C%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20para%20evaluar%20un%20debate%20en%20el%20aula%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%22Organizaci%F3n%22%2C%22Debate%22%2C%22Uso%20de%20hechos%22%2C%22Informaci%F3n%22%2C%22Presentaci%F3n%20y%20lenguaje%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%224%20Excelente%22%2C%223%20Satisfactorio%22%2C%222%20Mejorable%22%2C%221%20Insuficiente%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Todos%20los%20argumentos%20est%E1n%20organizados%20de%20forma%20l%F3gica%20en%20torno%20a%20una%20idea%20principal.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20los%20argumentos%20est%E1n%20organizados%20de%20forma%20l%F3gica%20en%20torno%20a%20una%20idea%20principal.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Una%20parte%20de%20los%20argumentos%20no%20est%E1n%20organizados%20en%20torno%20a%20una%20idea%20principal%20de%20forma%20clara%20y%20l%F3gica.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Los%20argumentos%20no%20est%E1n%20vinculados%20a%20una%20idea%20principal.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Todos%20los%20contra-argumentos%20son%20precisos%2C%20relevantes%20y%20fuertes.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20los%20contra-argumentos%20son%20precisos%2C%20relevantes%20y%20fuertes.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Algunos%20contra-argumentos%20son%20precisos%2C%20relevantes%20y%20fuertes%2C%20pero%20otros%20son%20muy%20d%E9biles.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Los%20contra-argumentos%20no%20son%20precisos%20y/o%20relevantes.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Cada%20punto%20principal%20esta%20bien%20apoyado%20con%20varios%20hechos%20relevantes%2C%20estad%EDsticas%20y/o%20ejemplos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Casi%20todos%20los%20puntos%20principales%20est%E1n%20adecuadamente%20apoyados%20con%20varios%20hechos%20relevantes%2C%20estad%EDsticas%20y/o%20ejemplos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Cada%20punto%20principal%20esta%20adecuadamente%20apoyado%20con%20varios%20hechos%2C%20estad%EDsticas%20y/o%20ejemplos%3B%20pero%20algunos%20de%20los%20hechos%20no%20son%20relevantes.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Los%20puntos%20principales%20no%20est%E1n%20apoyados%20por%20hechos.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Toda%20la%20informaci%F3n%20presentada%20en%20el%20debate%20es%20clara%20y%20precisa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%20parte%20de%20la%20informaci%F3n%20presentada%20en%20el%20debate%20es%20clara%20y%20precisa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%20parte%20de%20la%20informaci%F3n%20presentada%20en%20el%20debate%20no%20es%20clara%20ni%20precisa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20informaci%F3n%20tiene%20varios%20errores%20y%20no%20siempre%20es%20clara.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20equipo%20usa%20continuamente%20gestos%2C%20contacto%20visual%2C%20tono%20de%20voz%2C%20nivel%20de%20entusiasmo%20y%20el%20lenguaje%20en%20una%20forma%20que%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20equipo%20por%20lo%20general%20usa%20gestos%2C%20contacto%20visual%2C%20tono%20de%20voz%2C%20nivel%20de%20entusiasmo%20y%20lenguaje%20en%20una%20forma%20que%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20equipo%20algunas%20veces%20usa%20gestos%2C%20contacto%20visual%2C%20tono%20de%20voz%20%2C%20nivel%20de%20entusiasmo%20y%20lenguaje%20en%20una%20forma%20que%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Uno%20o%20m%E1s%20de%20los%20miembros%20del%20equipo%20tienen%20un%20estilo%20de%20presentaci%F3n%20y%20lenguaje%20que%20no%20mantiene%20la%20atenci%F3n%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%5D%5D%2C%22instructions%22%3A%22%3Cp%3EDebate%2C%20junto%20a%20tu%20grupo%2C%20los%20resultados%20obtenidos%20con%20el%20resto%20de%20la%20clase.%20Toma%20nota%20de%20las%20conclusiones%20finales.%3C/p%3E%22%2C%22visible-info%22%3Afalse%2C%22author%22%3A%22CEDEC%22%2C%22author-url%22%3A%22http%3A//cedec.intef.es/%22%2C%22license%22%3A%22CC-BY-SA%22%2C%22i18n%22%3A%7B%22rubric%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%22%2C%22activity%22%3A%22Actividad%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Nombre%22%2C%22date%22%3A%22Fecha%22%2C%22score%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22notes%22%3A%22Notas%22%2C%22download%22%3A%22Descargar%22%2C%22msgDelete%22%3A%22%BFSeguro%20que%20desea%20borrar%20todos%20los%20campos%20del%20formulario%3F%22%2C%22reset%22%3A%22Reiniciar%22%2C%22print%22%3A%22Imprimir%22%2C%22apply%22%3A%22Aplicar%22%2C%22newWindow%22%3A%22Ventana%20nueva%22%2C%22msgEndGameScore%22%3A%22Completa%20la%20r%FAbrica%20antes%20de%20guardar%20tu%20puntuaci%F3n.%22%2C%22msgScoreScorm%22%3A%22La%20puntuaci%F3n%20no%20se%20puede%20guardar%20porque%20esta%20p%E1gina%20no%20forma%20parte%20%20de%20un%20paquete%20SCORM.%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveScore%22%3A%22%A1Solo%20puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20una%20vez%21%22%2C%22msgYouScore%22%3A%22Su%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%20Solo%20puedes%20completarla%20una%20vez.%22%2C%22msgSaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20autom%E1ticamente%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%22%2C%22msgSeveralScore%22%3A%22Puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20tantas%20veces%20como%20quiera%22%2C%22msgYouLastScore%22%3A%22La%20%FAltima%20puntuaci%F3n%20guardada%20es%22%2C%22msgActityComply%22%3A%22Ya%20ha%20realizado%20esta%20actividad.%22%2C%22msgPlaySeveralTimes%22%3A%22Puede%20realizar%20esta%20actividad%20cuantas%20veces%20quiera%22%2C%22msgScore%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgWeight%22%3A%22Peso%22%7D%2C%22isScorm%22%3A0%2C%22textButtonScorm%22%3A%22Guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22repeatActivity%22%3Atrue%2C%22weighted%22%3A100%7D

  • Puntuación
  • Peso
%3Cp%3EDebate%2C%20junto%20a%20tu%20grupo%2C%20los%20resultados%20obtenidos%20con%20el%20resto%20de%20la%20clase.%20Toma%20nota%20de%20las%20conclusiones%20finales.%3C/p%3E

Ya hemos llegado al final. Ahora tenéis que explicar todo lo que habéis hecho.

Presenta el Genially que has creado, junto al padlet y al mural, y explica, junto a tu grupo, tanto el proceso que habéis seguido como los resultados obtenidos.

Pega los enlaces en este apartado así como una imagen (puede ser una foto) del mural.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"id":"idevice-1777535778727-e7asi8abv","typeGame":"Case study","history":"

\n

Pega los enlaces en este apartado así como una imagen (puede ser una foto) del mural.

","feedback":"","buttonCaption":"Mostrar retroalimentación"}]}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Completa la siguiente rúbrica

%7B%22typeGame%22%3A%22Rubric%22%2C%22version%22%3A2%2C%22id%22%3A%22idevice-1777492308684-3n0l06uom%22%2C%22table%22%3A%7B%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20para%20evaluar%20una%20presentaci%F3n%20de%20diapositivas%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%22Portada%20y%20t%EDtulo%22%2C%22%CDndice%22%2C%22La%20presentaci%F3n%u2026%22%2C%22La%20informaci%F3n%22%2C%22El%20nivel%20ling%FC%EDstico%22%2C%22El%20texto%22%2C%22Otros%20recursos%22%2C%22La%20ortograf%EDa%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%224%20Excelente%22%2C%223%20Satisfactorio%22%2C%222%20Mejorable%22%2C%221%20Insuficiente%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20t%EDtulo%20se%20ajustan%20muy%20bien%20a%20los%20contenidos%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%20El%20t%EDtulo%20es%20sugerente%20y%20muy%20creativo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20el%20t%EDtulo%20se%20ajustan%20bien%20a%20los%20contenidos%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%20El%20t%EDtulo%20es%20atractivo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20el%20t%EDtulo%20se%20ajustan%20suficientemente%20al%20contenido%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20el%20t%EDtulo%20no%20se%20ajustan%20a%20los%20contenidos%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20aparecen%20muy%20bien%20reflejados%20todos%20los%20apartados%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20aparecen%20bien%20reflejados%20los%20apartados%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20aparecen%20los%20apartados%20suficientes%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20no%20aparecen%20los%20aspectos%20principales%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Respeta%20muy%20bien%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Respeta%20bien%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Respeta%20suficientemente%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20su%20mayor%EDa%20no%20respeta%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aparece%20muy%20ordenada%2C%20es%20coherente.%20Existe%20una%20gran%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20texto%20e%20imagen.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aparece%20ordenada%20y%2C%20en%20su%20mayor%EDa%20es%20coherente.%20Casi%20siempre%20existe%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20el%20texto%20y%20la%20imagen.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Es%20suficientemente%20ordenada%20y%20coherente.%20Algunas%20veces%2C%20no%20existe%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20el%20texto%20y%20la%20imagen.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20muchos%20casos%20es%20desordenada%20e%20incoherente.%20y%20no%20hay%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20imagen%20y%20texto.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Es%20muy%20apropiado%20para%20explicar%20a%20los%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20veces%2C%20es%20apropiado%20para%20explicar%20a%20los%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Algunas%20veces%2C%20es%20apropiado%20para%20explicar%20a%20los%20compa%F1eros%2C%20y%20otra%20no.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20veces%2C%20es%20inapropiado%20para%20ser%20entendido%20por%20los%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Resume%20muy%20claramente%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Resume%20bien%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Resume%20suficientemente%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20resume%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22A%20lo%20largo%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n%2C%20aparecen%20im%E1genes%2C%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20%283-4%29%20y%20v%EDdeos%20relacionados%20con%20el%20tema%20%283%29.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20la%20mayor%EDa%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n%2C%20aparecen%20im%E1genes%2C%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20%282-1%29%20y%20v%EDdeos%20relacionados%20con%20el%20tema%20%282%29.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20parte%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n%2C%20aparecen%20im%E1genes%2C%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20%281%29%20y%20v%EDdeos%20relacionados%20con%20el%20tema%20%281%29.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Presentaci%F3n%20pobre%20en%20im%E1genes%2C%20y%20sin%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20ni%20v%EDdeos.%20Si%20aparecen%2C%20no%20tienen%20que%20ver%20con%20el%20tema.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20existen%20errores%20ortogr%E1ficos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20ortograf%EDa%20es%20buena.%20Falta%20alg%FAn%20acento.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20ortograf%EDa%20es%20suficiente%20pero%20existen%20dos%20faltas%20de%20ortograf%EDa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Existen%20importantes%20fallos%20ortogr%E1ficos.%22%7D%5D%5D%7D%2C%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20para%20evaluar%20una%20presentaci%F3n%20de%20diapositivas%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%22Portada%20y%20t%EDtulo%22%2C%22%CDndice%22%2C%22La%20presentaci%F3n%u2026%22%2C%22La%20informaci%F3n%22%2C%22El%20nivel%20ling%FC%EDstico%22%2C%22El%20texto%22%2C%22Otros%20recursos%22%2C%22La%20ortograf%EDa%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%224%20Excelente%22%2C%223%20Satisfactorio%22%2C%222%20Mejorable%22%2C%221%20Insuficiente%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20t%EDtulo%20se%20ajustan%20muy%20bien%20a%20los%20contenidos%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%20El%20t%EDtulo%20es%20sugerente%20y%20muy%20creativo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20el%20t%EDtulo%20se%20ajustan%20bien%20a%20los%20contenidos%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%20El%20t%EDtulo%20es%20atractivo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20el%20t%EDtulo%20se%20ajustan%20suficientemente%20al%20contenido%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20portada%20y%20el%20t%EDtulo%20no%20se%20ajustan%20a%20los%20contenidos%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20aparecen%20muy%20bien%20reflejados%20todos%20los%20apartados%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20aparecen%20bien%20reflejados%20los%20apartados%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20aparecen%20los%20apartados%20suficientes%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20el%20%EDndice%20no%20aparecen%20los%20aspectos%20principales%20del%20tema%20investigado.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Respeta%20muy%20bien%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Respeta%20bien%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Respeta%20suficientemente%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20su%20mayor%EDa%20no%20respeta%20el%20%EDndice.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aparece%20muy%20ordenada%2C%20es%20coherente.%20Existe%20una%20gran%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20texto%20e%20imagen.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aparece%20ordenada%20y%2C%20en%20su%20mayor%EDa%20es%20coherente.%20Casi%20siempre%20existe%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20el%20texto%20y%20la%20imagen.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Es%20suficientemente%20ordenada%20y%20coherente.%20Algunas%20veces%2C%20no%20existe%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20el%20texto%20y%20la%20imagen.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20muchos%20casos%20es%20desordenada%20e%20incoherente.%20y%20no%20hay%20relaci%F3n%20entre%20imagen%20y%20texto.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Es%20muy%20apropiado%20para%20explicar%20a%20los%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20veces%2C%20es%20apropiado%20para%20explicar%20a%20los%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Algunas%20veces%2C%20es%20apropiado%20para%20explicar%20a%20los%20compa%F1eros%2C%20y%20otra%20no.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20veces%2C%20es%20inapropiado%20para%20ser%20entendido%20por%20los%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Resume%20muy%20claramente%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Resume%20bien%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Resume%20suficientemente%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20resume%20la%20informaci%F3n%20esencial.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22A%20lo%20largo%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n%2C%20aparecen%20im%E1genes%2C%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20%283-4%29%20y%20v%EDdeos%20relacionados%20con%20el%20tema%20%283%29.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20la%20mayor%EDa%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n%2C%20aparecen%20im%E1genes%2C%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20%282-1%29%20y%20v%EDdeos%20relacionados%20con%20el%20tema%20%282%29.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22En%20parte%20de%20la%20presentaci%F3n%2C%20aparecen%20im%E1genes%2C%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20%281%29%20y%20v%EDdeos%20relacionados%20con%20el%20tema%20%281%29.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Presentaci%F3n%20pobre%20en%20im%E1genes%2C%20y%20sin%20direcciones%20de%20Internet%20ni%20v%EDdeos.%20Si%20aparecen%2C%20no%20tienen%20que%20ver%20con%20el%20tema.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20existen%20errores%20ortogr%E1ficos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20ortograf%EDa%20es%20buena.%20Falta%20alg%FAn%20acento.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20ortograf%EDa%20es%20suficiente%20pero%20existen%20dos%20faltas%20de%20ortograf%EDa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Existen%20importantes%20fallos%20ortogr%E1ficos.%22%7D%5D%5D%2C%22instructions%22%3A%22%3Cp%3ECompleta%20la%20siguiente%20r%FAbrica%3C/p%3E%22%2C%22visible-info%22%3Afalse%2C%22author%22%3A%22CEDEC%22%2C%22author-url%22%3A%22http%3A//cedec.intef.es/%22%2C%22license%22%3A%22CC-BY-SA%22%2C%22i18n%22%3A%7B%22rubric%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%22%2C%22activity%22%3A%22Actividad%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Nombre%22%2C%22date%22%3A%22Fecha%22%2C%22score%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22notes%22%3A%22Notas%22%2C%22download%22%3A%22Descargar%22%2C%22msgDelete%22%3A%22%BFSeguro%20que%20desea%20borrar%20todos%20los%20campos%20del%20formulario%3F%22%2C%22reset%22%3A%22Reiniciar%22%2C%22print%22%3A%22Imprimir%22%2C%22apply%22%3A%22Aplicar%22%2C%22newWindow%22%3A%22Ventana%20nueva%22%2C%22msgEndGameScore%22%3A%22Completa%20la%20r%FAbrica%20antes%20de%20guardar%20tu%20puntuaci%F3n.%22%2C%22msgScoreScorm%22%3A%22La%20puntuaci%F3n%20no%20se%20puede%20guardar%20porque%20esta%20p%E1gina%20no%20forma%20parte%20%20de%20un%20paquete%20SCORM.%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveScore%22%3A%22%A1Solo%20puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20una%20vez%21%22%2C%22msgYouScore%22%3A%22Su%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%20Solo%20puedes%20completarla%20una%20vez.%22%2C%22msgSaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20autom%E1ticamente%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%22%2C%22msgSeveralScore%22%3A%22Puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20tantas%20veces%20como%20quiera%22%2C%22msgYouLastScore%22%3A%22La%20%FAltima%20puntuaci%F3n%20guardada%20es%22%2C%22msgActityComply%22%3A%22Ya%20ha%20realizado%20esta%20actividad.%22%2C%22msgPlaySeveralTimes%22%3A%22Puede%20realizar%20esta%20actividad%20cuantas%20veces%20quiera%22%2C%22msgScore%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgWeight%22%3A%22Peso%22%7D%2C%22isScorm%22%3A0%2C%22textButtonScorm%22%3A%22Guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22repeatActivity%22%3Atrue%2C%22weighted%22%3A100%7D

المنصات:

Canva

بحنان

مجداف

Tareas

Tareas

1. Graba sonidos de tu entorno y guarda los datos (en grupos de 4 personas) en el patio y en la clase de música.

2. Crea un padlet con etiquetas para los sonidos recogidos y ponle nombre a cada una ("sonidos ruidosos", "sonidos alegres", etc)

3. Debate con tus compañeros y compañeras los resultados y escribe las conclusiones que se tomen.

4. Haz un mural-resumen con todos los datos y también una presentación en genially para publicarlos online.

Lectura facilitada

المهام

1. قم بتسجيل الأصوات من بيئتك واحفظ البيانات (في مجموعات مكونة من 4 أشخاص) في الملعب وفي فصل الموسيقى.

2. أنشئ لوحة تحتوي على تسميات للأصوات المجمعة وقم بتسمية كل واحدة منها ("أصوات صاخبة"، "أصوات سعيدة"، إلخ.)

3. ناقش النتائج مع زملائك واكتب الاستنتاجات المستخلصة.

4. أنشئ جدارًا ملخصًا بجميع البيانات وأيضًا عرضًا تقديميًا للنشر عبر الإنترنت.

Producto final

Proyecto final

Coloca el mural en un lugar visible, publica la presentación de Genially y explica al resto de tus compañeros y compañeras todo el trabajo realizado y las conclusiones a las que habéis llegado.

Lectura facilitada

المشروع النهائي

ضع اللوحة الجدارية في مكان ظاهر، وانشر العرض التقديمي اللطيف واشرح لبقية زملائك كل العمل المنجز والاستنتاجات التي توصلت إليها.
